caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a recording studio against a backdrop of dark gray acoustic foam panels. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones, with several colorful tattoos visible on his right arm. He is positioned in front of a silver professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. In the beginning, the man rests his right hand on his head with his eyes closed. As the sequence progresses, he opens his eyes and begins to speak, his mouth opening and closing. Throughout the movement, he continues to touch the top of his head. A small, partially obscured logo containing the text "Since" is visible on the chest of his shirt. The lighting is consistent, and the camera remains in a steady close-up shot as the man shifts his facial expression and head position slightly.
